article_title: 2026 软件工程书单：按你当下的问题来选书
core_theme: 软件工程书籍推荐应该按问题域而非热门度来组织
reader_takeaway: 根据自己当前卡在什么问题上，找到对应的那本书
summary_angle: 从左到右展现从「盲目追热门」到「按问题精准选书」的转变

information_blocks.source_anchor: the right question isn't 'what should I read?' It's 'What am I struggling with right now?'
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面左侧：模糊、杂乱的书堆，暗示无方向的阅读

information_blocks.source_anchor: 8 problem domains each with specific books
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面中央偏右：一个清晰的阅读空间，按问题标签分区

information_blocks.source_anchor: Pick the book that matches where you're stuck right now
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个读者站在决策点，面前是匹配度指示，不是排行榜

main_metaphor: 安静的书房/阅览空间，书不按作者或销量排列，而是按「你此刻的困境」分类
primary_subject: 一个安静的读者侧影，站在问题标签引导的书籍区域前
subject_action: 正在选择一本书，不是浏览排行榜，而是对照自己的问题
composition: 左右对照：左模糊杂乱→右清晰有序，中央单点聚焦于读者与书的连接
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: low-saturation arthouse illustration, quiet composition, subtle grain, muted colors, reflective emotional tone
selected_style_reason: 从40项风格池中随机选中。书单推荐类文章适合用安静、有思考感的视觉氛围，避免喧闹的营销感
style_safety_note: 无需改写，该风格为抽象美学描述，不指向特定品牌、工作室或艺术家
draft_goal: 第一轮验证：左右对照构图是否清晰、低饱和文艺氛围是否成立、读者与书的连接是否自然
revision_targets: 构图平衡（左右比重不协调）
氛围（过于鲜艳或过于灰暗）
信息块可读性（标签不清晰）
final_prompt: conceptual editorial illustration, wide cover 2.35:1. A quiet library corner bathed in soft diffuse light. Left side: a blurred, cluttered pile of books with a faint faded label reading '热门书单', representing undirected popular reading. Center-right: a calm reader silhouette stands at a decision point, facing organized book sections labeled by problem tags (not genre). The books are arranged in subtle thematic clusters. A gentle visual path leads from the cluttered left to the focused right. Low-saturation arthouse illustration, quiet composition, subtle film grain texture, muted warm grey and faded paper tones with hints of muted blue-grey and pale ochre, reflective emotional tone, no poster title, no dashboard, no robots, no neon, no fake UI
